primary_sources.title: Unicode Standard Annex #31: Unicode Identifiers and Syntax
Unicode Technical Standard #39: Unicode Security Mechanisms

finding: XID_Start/XID_Continue syntax eligibility and default-ignorable exclusion are independent predicates. The authenticated identifier gate must reject Default_Ignorable_Code_Point values after NFC normalization and before skeleton-registry mutation, even when those values are XID_Continue and Identifier_Status Allowed.

pipeline: mutate registry only after all predicates pass
design_implication.fail_closed_rule: A false or missing predicate prevents registry mutation.

implementation.change: buildUnicodeIdentifierAdmissionWithSyntax now applies the authenticated default-ignorable profile before registration; tests cover XID-valid U+200D and U+FE0F rejection and verify a rejected registration does not occupy the base skeleton.

verification.method: connector-backed exact-file inspection and dependency review
verification.reason: The isolated container had no network path to clone GitHub, and no repository CI execution tool was available in this run.

uncertainty: The updated test suite has not been executed against a fresh checkout.
The complete Unicode 17.0.0 DerivedCoreProperties payload has not been exercised in this run.
Contextual joining-control allowances are intentionally unsupported.
Script restriction, bidi display safety, and application display policy remain separate gates.
falsification_route: Execute the committed test file and observe any failure.
Provide an authenticated XID-valid Default_Ignorable_Code_Point that is admitted.
Show that a rejected identifier mutates the skeleton registry.
Run the full Unicode 17.0.0 corpus and find disagreement with the declared UAX #31 plus UTS #39 profile.
privacy_boundary: Public standards, repository source, commit metadata, and abstract security decisions only; no private chat, health, credentials, identifying personal data, or unreviewed uploads.
